title: Captain Underpants and the Perilous Plot of Professor Poopypants
titleZh: 内裤队长与 poopypants 教授的惊天阴谋
author: Dav Pilkey
desc: A mad scientist forces the whole world to rename itself!

q.en: Who is the mad-scientist villain trying to take over the planet?
q.zh: 这个企图统治地球的疯狂科学家反派是谁？

options.en: Professor Pippy P. Poopypants (middle name Pee-Pee)
options.zh: 皮皮·P· poopypants 教授（中间名是 Pee-Pee）

explain.en: Professor Pippy P. Poopypants (whose middle name is Pee-Pee) is the genius inventor from New Swissland who snaps and decides to take over the world with his giant robot suit.
explain.zh: 皮皮·P·poopypants 教授（中间名是 Pee-Pee）是来自“新瑞士兰”的天才发明家，他精神崩溃后决定用巨型机器人套装统治世界。

q.en: What are the two amazing inventions Professor Poopypants brings to America?
q.zh: poopypants 教授带到美国的两项神奇发明是什么？

options.en: A time machine and a jet pack
A robot dog and a laser cannon
The Shrinky-Pig 2000 (shrinks things) and the Goosy-Grow 4000 (makes things grow)
options.zh: 收缩猪2000（让东西变小）和生长鹅4000（让东西变大）

explain.en: He shows off the Shrinky-Pig 2000 (which shrank a trash heap to the size of a gumball) and the Goosy-Grow 4000 (which grew a hot dog until it crashed through the lab wall).
explain.zh: 他展示了“收缩猪2000”（把一堆垃圾缩小到口香糖球大小）和“生长鹅4000”（让一个热狗不断变大、撞穿实验室墙壁）。

q.en: Why were George and Harold banned from the school field trip to Piqua Pizza Palace?
q.zh: 乔治和哈罗德为什么被禁止参加去 Piqua 披萨宫殿的校外旅行？

options.en: Mr. Krupp caught them changing the letters on the school sign, so he banned them and made them clean the teachers' lounge
options.zh: 克拉普先生抓到他们篡改学校招牌上的字母，于是禁止他们去，并让他们打扫教师休息室

options.en: They refused to get on the bus

options.zh: 他们催眠了克拉普先生

options.en: They threw food in the cafeteria

explain.en: While waiting for the bus, George and Harold changed the letters on the school sign. Mr. Krupp caught them red-handed and punished them by banning the field trip and making them clean the teachers' lounge instead.
explain.zh: 等校车时，乔治和哈罗德把学校招牌上的字母换了个位置。克拉普先生当场抓到他们，于是不让他们去旅行，罚他们去打扫教师休息室。

q.en: What prank did George and Harold set up in the teachers' lounge?
q.zh: 乔治和哈罗德在教师休息室里布置了什么恶作剧？

options.en: They glued the teachers to their chairs
options.zh: 他们把老师粘在椅子上（这是比较有迷惑性的一个选项。）

options.en: They replaced the coffee with ink
options.zh: 他们把咖啡换成了墨水

options.en: They filled the room with balloons
They taped the sink sprayer on, sprinkled powdered paste on the ceiling fan, and hid Styrofoam worms in the fridge so teachers looked like snowmen
options.zh: 他们把水龙头喷头用胶带固定成一直喷、在吊扇上撒粉末浆糊、在冰箱里藏泡沫塑料虫，让老师看起来像雪人

explain.en: When the teachers turned on the lights and faucet, cold water sprayed them, the fan flung paste everywhere, and Styrofoam pellets from the fridge stuck to the goo — making them look like 'giant evil snowmen.'
explain.zh: 老师一开灯开水龙头，冷水就喷他们一身；吊扇把浆糊甩得到处都是；冰箱里的泡沫塑料虫粘在黏糊糊的身上——让他们看起来像“巨型邪恶雪人”。

q.en: How did Professor Poopypants end up working as a science teacher at the school?
q.zh: poopypants 教授是怎么当上学校科学老师的？

options.en: He was sent there by the government
options.zh: 他是政府派去的（这是比较有迷惑性的一个选项。）

options.en: He was laughed out of every major U.S. science institution, so he became an elementary-school teacher thinking kids wouldn't laugh at his name
options.zh: 他被美国各大科研机构嘲笑赶走，于是去当小学老师，以为孩子们不会笑他的名字

options.en: Mr. Krupp hired him as a favor
options.zh: 克拉普先生出于好心雇了他

explain.en: After being giggled out of Georgetown, Harvard, Yale, Stanford, and more, he decided to become an elementary-school science teacher, sure that 'kids are so accepting and loving' and wouldn't laugh at his name. He was wrong.
explain.zh: 在被乔治城、哈佛、耶鲁、斯坦福等一所所大学嘲笑赶走后，他决定去当小学科学老师，以为“孩子都很包容、有爱心”不会笑他的名字。结果他错了。

q.en: What was the Gerbil Jogger 2000 that the professor showed the class?
q.zh: 教授给全班展示的“沙鼠慢跑者2000”是什么？

options.en: A robot suit that lets a pet gerbil jog alongside its owner
options.zh: 一个让宠物沙鼠跟着主人一起慢跑的机器人套装
给老鼠用的迷你自行车

explain.en: The Gerbil Jogger 2000 is a mini robot you put a pet gerbil inside so it can jog along beside you. The kids loved it — Connor Mancini even said 'Science is COOL!'
explain.zh: “沙鼠慢跑者2000”是一个迷你机器人，把宠物沙鼠放进去它就能跟着主人一起慢跑。孩子们很喜欢——康纳·曼奇尼甚至说“科学真酷！”

q.en: With his Name Change-O-Chart 2000, what did Professor Poopypants force everyone to do?
q.zh: 借助“改名图表2000”，poopypants 教授强迫所有人做什么？

options.en: Change their real names into silly names or get SHRUNK
options.zh: 把真名改成搞笑名字，否则就会被缩小

explain.en: He made everyone on the planet rename themselves using three code charts — turning normal names into silly ones — and threatened to shrink anyone who refused.
explain.zh: 他强迫地球上所有人用三张密码图表改名——把正常名字变成搞笑名字——并威胁谁拒绝就把谁缩小。

q.en: After the Name Change-O-Chart, what became Mr. Krupp's silly new name?
q.zh: 经过改名图表，克拉普先生的搞笑新名字变成了什么？

explain.en: Mr. Krupp admitted his first name was Benny (B = Lumpy) and his last name Krupp starts with K (K = Potty) and ends with P (P = biscuits), so his new name was 'Lumpy Pottybiscuits.'
explain.zh: 克拉普先生承认自己名叫本尼（B=Lumpy 大块头），姓 Krupp，首字母 K（K=Potty 马桶）、尾字母 P（P=biscuits 饼干），所以新名字是“大块头·马桶饼干”。

q.en: In the comic George and Harold wrote ('The Pied Pooper of Piqua'), what did Professor Poopypants use to attack?
q.zh: 在乔治和哈罗德写的漫画（《Piqua 的便便笛手》）里，poopypants 教授用什么来发动攻击？

options.zh: 一艘装满外星人的飞船

explain.en: In their comic, Professor Poopypants builds thousands of evil Gerbil Jogger 2000s, rounds up all the children, and battles Captain Underpants — which is exactly the kind of thing the real professor later does.
explain.zh: 在他们的漫画里，poopypants 教授造了几千个邪恶的“沙鼠慢跑者2000”，把孩子们全部抓起来，还和内裤队长开战——后来真教授干的事几乎一模一样。

q.en: After the world was renamed, what silly names did George and Harold get?
q.zh: 全世界改名之后，乔治和哈罗德得到了什么搞笑名字？

options.zh: 软绵绵·马桶鼻和奶酪球·华夫裤

explain.en: Once the Name Change-O-Chart took effect, the book calls the two friends 'Fluffy Toiletnose' (the one with the tie and flat-top) and 'Cheeseball Wafflepants' (the one with the T-shirt and bad haircut).
explain.zh: 改名图表生效后，书里把这两个朋友叫做“软绵绵·马桶鼻”（打领带、平头那位）和“奶酪球·华夫裤”（穿T恤、发型糟糕那位）。
